query:
SELECT id, number, status, orderId, reservedAt FROM tickets WHERE number = '004';
SELECT id, status, stripeSessionId, stripePaymentIntentId FROM orders WHERE id IN (SELECT orderId FROM tickets WHERE number = '004');
